title: The Army Game
writer: André Mouëzy-Éon, André Sylvane, François Truffaut
actors: Christian de Tillière, Ricet Barrier, Jacques Balutin
plot: Jean Lerat de la Grignotière is as full of himself as his name is long. Heeding (somewhat reluctantly to be true) the call of the Motherland he goes to the barracks where he is to accomplish his military duty. Posted to Corporal B...
